title: SQL Import Hanging or Stuck? Here’s the Fix
description: Imports that freeze mid‑way are usually caused by big statements or timeouts. Split the dump.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: If the import progress bar stops moving, you’re likely hitting execution limits or oversized queries.
Split the dump and re‑import in smaller chunks. This reduces runtime per request.

content.title: Unstick your import
content.text: Split big SQL files and try again.

faq.question: Should I wait longer?
faq.answer: If it’s been stuck for minutes, it likely won’t finish.
